summary: Funded Prime scores 80/100 in our evaluation, standing out as one of the few prop firms offering dedicated access to cryptocurrency and meme coin markets. With over 250 crypto pairs available and unique meme coin trading with 10:1 leverage, it fills a niche that most prop firms overlook.
cons: Weekend trading limited to meme coins only
bestFor: Crypto-focused traders who want extensive digital asset access and meme coin leverage
notIdealFor: Forex-only traders or those who want commission-free crypto trading
